TranslationContext: This file contains Unit Names for the Darkborn Elves Faction.

Translations.Comment: Dunkelgeboren = darkborn. Dark elves with a sinister edge. Темнорождённые emphasizes the ominous, cursed origin of these dark elves.
Spear-wielding dark elf infantry. Копейщики = spearmen/spear-wielders, common military terminology.
Schrecken = dread. Elite heavy infantry radiating fear. Страж ужаса conveys both protection/guard and the terrifying nature of these elite warriors.
Hexen = witches. Dark magic users of the dark elves. Ведьмы = witches, emphasizing dark arcane power.
Crossbow-wielding dark elves. Deadly ranged troops. Арбалетчики = crossbowmen, precise ranged specialists.
Schatten = shadows. Stealthy infiltrators and assassins. Тени смерти (Shadows of Death) emphasizes both stealth and lethal intent.
Heavy artillery. Consistent with other bolt thrower translations. Болтомёт = bolt thrower, standard fantasy artillery terminology.
Knights riding vicious raptors. Fast and deadly cavalry. Рыцари рапторов emphasizes the mounted warrior aspect and their exotic mounts.
Dark elf cavalry on dark steeds. Всадники = riders/cavalry, denoting mounted warriors.
Dark elf chariot. Swift and cruel. Колесница = chariot, a classic fantasy wargame war machine.
Standard German term for hydra. Multi-headed monster. Гидра is the universal Russian term for this mythical creature.
Harpyien = harpies. Flying monsters in service of dark elves. Гарпии is the standard Russian term for these mythical flying creatures.
Direct translation. Fearsome black dragon. Чёрный дракон emphasizes the sinister, dark nature of this mighty beast.
Corrupted pegasus. Flying mount for heroes. Тёмный пегас conveys corruption of the noble pegasus, fitting the dark elf aesthetic.
Noble dark elf leader. Cruel and cunning. Дворянин = noble/nobleman, denoting aristocratic leadership and authority.
Priesterin = priestess. Female dark magic user and leader. Жрица = priestess, emphasizing religious/magical authority and feminine power.
Master of stealth and murder. Deadly hero unit. Убийца = assassin/killer, reflecting the lethal expertise and sinister nature of this hero.
